query:
INSERT INTO site_settings (setting_key, setting_value, setting_type, description, updated_at) VALUES 
('opening_time', '11:00', 'time', 'Restaurant opening time (24-hour format)', NOW()),
('closing_time', '22:00', 'time', 'Restaurant closing time (24-hour format)', NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE setting_value=VALUES(setting_value), updated_at=NOW();
